description: This is a scan and police response.

ID.description: ID is the identifier of the object.
ID.title: ID

alerts.description: List of alerts that got raised during the policy resolution.
alerts.title: alerts

client.description: The client used to send the request.
client.title: client

clientVersion.description: The version of the client used to send the request.
clientVersion.title: clientVersion

decision.description: User-facing outcome of the roundtrip. Reflects the policy engine's verdict, or in case of platform failure, the result of the failClose strategy (Deny on fail-close, Allow on fail-open, with structured error field carring the detail). NotApplicable is used by the scan and police APIs, which analyze content without rendering an enforcement decision. Error and UpstreamError stay in the allowed_choices list for backward compatibility with clients that still PUT those values; new round-trips never emit them — platform/upstream failures now surface via the structured Error field instead. NOTE: safe to drop Error and UpstreamError from this enum on or after 2026-07-19 (two months after the structured RoundtripError landed on 2026-05-19), once consumers have rolled forward.
decision.title: decision

error.description: Structured error info populated when a non-user-facing platform stage or the upstream provider failed. Carries the source (PlatformError vs UpstreamError), the failing stage, and a human-readable message.
error.title: error

latency.description: Information about latency of various stage of request and response.
latency.title: latency

mcpMessage.description: If this is an MCP message, then the MCP message details will be set here.
mcpMessage.title: mcpMessage

model.description: The model used by the request.
model.title: model

pipelineName.description: The name of the particular pipeline that extracted the text.
pipelineName.title: pipelineName

policyRefs.description: List of references to the policies used to make this roundtrip.
policyRefs.title: policyRefs

reasons.description: The various reasons returned by the policy engine.
reasons.title: reasons

time.description: Set the time of the message request.
time.title: time

toolChoice.description: Tool choice instructions for the model of a request.
toolChoice.title: toolChoice

tools.description: The various tools used by the request.
tools.title: tools

trace.description: References to the trace of the request.
trace.title: trace

title: PoliceResponse
